articles.title: Grayscale to Dissolve XRP Trust Due to SEC's Ripple Lawsuit
articles.description: Institutional investors interested in buying XRP will have to look elsewhere.

articles.title: Bitcoin price rally to $37,850 signals that bulls intend to reclaim $40K
articles.description: Bitcoin’s break above the $35,000 resistance shows bulls are serious about retaking $40,000 in the short-term.

articles.title: Grayscale says it will dissolve XRP Trust, citing market reaction to SEC lawsuit
articles.description: Grayscale is moving to dissolve its XRP Trust — a move that comes days after it announced the liquidation of XRP positions from its Digital Large Cap Fund.

articles.title: Kim Dotcom Wants to Fund Bitcoin Cash Development
articles.description: Kim Dotcom, founder of the infamous file sharing site Megaupload, has announced plans to fund Bitcoin Cash (BCH) development. I just had an online meeting with 10 talented coders who sent me their CV’s yesterday to brainstorm about apps they can build to bring Bitcoin Cash to the masses. I’ll do this every week. If you are a coder DM me your CV. You may be invited and get...

articles.title: Price analysis 1/13: BTC, ETH, XRP, LTC, ADA, BCH, DOT, XLM, LINK, BNB
articles.description: Traders are shifting funds into select altcoins as Bitcoin price trades in a sideways range.

articles.title: EU Crypto Payment Processor To Remove XRP Following The SEC Charges
articles.description: Over 4,000 merchants won't be able to use XRP as the Lithuanian-based cryptocurrency processor CoinGate will remove the token as of January 15th.

articles.title: Yearn proposes “buyback and build” strategy for YFI holders
articles.description: Instead of receiving dividends, Yearn.finance would buy and redistribute tokens with protocol revenue.

articles.title: Thousands of Merchants Will No Longer Be Able to Accept XRP as CoinGate Suspends Support for Cryptocurrency
articles.description: Crypto payments company CoinGate will pull the plug on XRP until there's more certainty regarding Ripple's legal battle with the SEC

articles.title: Plasm Network deploys first parachain on Polkadot’s Rococo V1 testnet
articles.description: Polkadot may soon see its first-ever parachain, with Plasm Network announcing today that it has successfully connected to Polkadot’s testnet Rococo V1 locally. Announced last month, the Rococo-V1 testnet is based on the latest version of the parachain consensus, which is the same code that will run on Polkadot and Kusama. According to Polkadot Co-Founder […]

articles.title: Charted: Why Synthetix’s SNX Could Rally To $20 While Bitcoin Corrects
articles.description: Synthetix (SNX) remained in a bullish zone above $15.00, despite pullbacks in bitcoin and ethereum against the US Dollar. SNX price is likely to rally towards $20.00 if it clears the $16.00 hurdle. There was a steady increase in synthetix’s SNX price above $12.00 against the US dollar.
